oi de amelēsantes apēlthon o men eis ton idion agron o de eis tēn emporian autou
oi de loipoi kratēsantes tous doulous autou ybrisan kai apekteinan
akousas de o basileus ōrgisthē kai pempsas ta strateumata autou apōlesen tous phoneis ekeinous kai tēn polin autōn eneprēsen
tote legei tois doulois autou o men gamos etoimos estin oi de keklēmenoi ouk ēsan axioi
poreuesthe oun epi tas diexodous tōn odōn kai osous an eurēte kalesate eis tous gamous
kai exelthontes oi douloi ekeinoi eis tas odous synēgagon pantas osous euron ponērous te kai agathous kai eplēsthē o gamos anakeimenōn
eiselthōn de o basileus theasasthai tous anakeimenous eiden ekei anthrōpon ouk endedymenon endyma gamou
kai legei autō etaire pōs eisēlthes ōde mē echōn endyma gamou o de ephimōthē
tote eipen o basileus tois diakonois dēsantes autou podas kai cheiras arate auton kai ekbalete eis to skotos to exōteron ekei estai o klauthmos kai o brygmos tōn odontōn
polloi gar eisin klētoi oligoi de eklektoi
tote poreuthentes oi pharisaioi symboulion elabon opōs auton pagideusōsin en logō

kai apostellousin autō tous mathētas autōn meta tōn ērōdianōn legontes didaskale oidamen oti alēthēs ei kai tēn odon tou theou en alētheia didaskeis kai ou melei soi peri oudenos ou gar blepeis eis prosōpon anthrōpōn
eipe oun ēmin ti soi dokei exestin dounai kēnson kaisari ē ou
gnous de o iēsous tēn ponērian autōn eipen ti me peirazete ypokritai
epideixate moi to nomisma tou kēnsou oi de prosēnenkan autō dēnarion
kai legei autois tinos ē eikōn autē kai ē epigraphē
legousin autō kaisaros tote legei autois apodote oun ta kaisaros kaisari kai ta tou theou tō theō
kai akousantes ethaumasan kai aphentes auton apēlthon
en ekeinē tē ēmera prosēlthon autō saddoukaioi oi legontes mē einai anastasin kai epērōtēsan auton
legontes didaskale mōsēs eipen ean tis apothanē mē echōn tekna epigambreusei o adelphos autou tēn gynaika autou kai anastēsei sperma tō adelphō autou
ēsan de par ēmin epta adelphoi kai o prōtos gamēsas eteleutēsen kai mē echōn sperma aphēken tēn gynaika autou tō adelphō autou
omoiōs kai o deuteros kai o tritos eōs tōn epta
ysteron de pantōn apethanen kai ē gynē
en tē oun anastasei tinos tōn epta estai gynē pantes gar eschon autēn
apokritheis de o iēsous eipen autois planasthe mē eidotes tas graphas mēde tēn dynamin tou theou
en gar tē anastasei oute gamousin oute ekgamizontai all ōs angeloi tou theou en ouranō eisin
peri de tēs anastaseōs tōn nekrōn ouk anegnōte to rēthen ymin ypo tou theou legontos
egō eimi o theos abraam kai o theos isaak kai o theos iakōb ouk estin o theos theos nekrōn alla zōntōn
kai akousantes oi ochloi exeplēssonto epi tē didachē autou
oi de pharisaioi akousantes oti ephimōsen tous saddoukaious synēchthēsan epi to auto
kai epērōtēsen eis ex autōn nomikos peirazōn auton kai legōn
didaskale poia entolē megalē en tō nomō
o de iēsous eipen autō agapēseis kyrion ton theon sou en olē tē kardia sou kai en olē tē psychē sou kai en olē tē dianoia sou
autē estin prōtē kai megalē entolē
deutera de omoia autē agapēseis ton plēsion sou ōs seauton
en tautais tais dysin entolais olos o nomos kai oi prophētai kremantai
synēgmenōn de tōn pharisaiōn epērōtēsen autous o iēsous
legōn ti ymin dokei peri tou christou tinos uios estin legousin autō tou dabid
legei autois pōs oun dabid en pneumati kyrion auton kalei legōn
eipen o kyrios tō kyriō mou kathou ek dexiōn mou eōs an thō tous echthrous sou ypopodion tōn podōn sou
ei oun dabid kalei auton kyrion pōs uios autou estin
kai oudeis edynato autō apokrithēnai logon oude etolmēsen tis ap ekeinēs tēs ēmeras eperōtēsai auton ouketi
tote o iēsous elalēsen tois ochlois kai tois mathētais autou
legōn epi tēs mōseōs kathedras ekathisan oi grammateis kai oi pharisaioi
panta oun osa an eipōsin ymin tērein tēreite kai poieite kata de ta erga autōn mē poieite legousin gar kai ou poiousin
desmeuousin gar phortia barea kai dysbastakta kai epititheasin epi tous ōmous tōn anthrōpōn tō de daktylō autōn ou thelousin kinēsai auta
panta de ta erga autōn poiousin pros to theathēnai tois anthrōpois platynousin de ta phylaktēria autōn kai megalynousin ta kraspeda tōn imatiōn autōn
philousin te tēn prōtoklisian en tois deipnois kai tas prōtokathedrias en tais synagōgais
kai tous aspasmous en tais agorais kai kaleisthai ypo tōn anthrōpōn rabbi rabbi
ymeis de mē klēthēte rabbi eis gar estin ymōn o kathēgētēs o christos pantes de ymeis adelphoi este
kai patera mē kalesēte ymōn epi tēs gēs eis gar estin o patēr ymōn o en tois ouranois
mēde klēthēte kathēgētai eis gar ymōn estin o kathēgētēs o christos
o de meizōn ymōn estai ymōn diakonos
ostis de ypsōsei eauton tapeinōthēsetai kai ostis tapeinōsei eauton ypsōthēsetai
ouai de ymin grammateis kai pharisaioi ypokritai oti kleiete tēn basileian tōn ouranōn emprosthen tōn anthrōpōn ymeis gar ouk eiserchesthe oude tous eiserchomenous aphiete eiselthein
ouai ymin grammateis kai pharisaioi ypokritai oti katesthiete tas oikias tōn chērōn kai prophasei makra proseuchomenoi dia touto lēpsesthe perissoteron krima
ouai ymin grammateis kai pharisaioi ypokritai oti periagete tēn thalassan kai tēn xēran poiēsai ena prosēlyton kai otan genētai poieite auton uion geennēs diploteron ymōn
ouai ymin odēgoi typhloi oi legontes os an omosē en tō naō ouden estin os d an omosē en tō chrysō tou naou opheilei
mōroi kai typhloi tis gar meizōn estin o chrysos ē o naos o agiazōn ton chryson
kai os ean omosē en tō thysiastēriō ouden estin os d an omosē en tō dōrō tō epanō autou opheilei
mōroi kai typhloi ti gar meizon to dōron ē to thysiastērion to agiazon to dōron
o oun omosas en tō thysiastēriō omnyei en autō kai en pasin tois epanō autou
kai o omosas en tō naō omnyei en autō kai en tō katoikounti auton
kai o omosas en tō ouranō omnyei en tō thronō tou theou kai en tō kathēmenō epanō autou

ouai ymin grammateis kai pharisaioi ypokritai oti apodekatoute to ēdyosmon kai to anēthon kai to kyminon kai aphēkate ta barytera tou nomou tēn krisin kai ton eleon kai tēn pistin tauta edei poiēsai kakeina mē aphienai
odēgoi typhloi oi diylizontes ton kōnōpa tēn de kamēlon katapinontes
ouai ymin grammateis kai pharisaioi ypokritai oti katharizete to exōthen tou potēriou kai tēs paropsidos esōthen de gemousin ex arpagēs kai akrasias
pharisaie typhle katharison prōton to entos tou potēriou kai tēs paropsidos ina genētai kai to ektos autōn katharon
ouai ymin grammateis kai pharisaioi ypokritai oti paromoiazete taphois kekoniamenois oitines exōthen men phainontai ōraioi esōthen de gemousin osteōn nekrōn kai pasēs akatharsias
outōs kai ymeis exōthen men phainesthe tois anthrōpois dikaioi esōthen de mestoi este ypokriseōs kai anomias
ouai ymin grammateis kai pharisaioi ypokritai oti oikodomeite tous taphous tōn prophētōn kai kosmeite ta mnēmeia tōn dikaiōn
kai legete ei ēmen en tais ēmerais tōn paterōn ēmōn ouk an ēmen koinōnoi autōn en tō aimati tōn prophētōn
ōste martyreite eautois oti uioi este tōn phoneusantōn tous prophētas
kai ymeis plērōsate to metron tōn paterōn ymōn
opheis gennēmata echidnōn pōs phygēte apo tēs kriseōs tēs geennēs
dia touto idou egō apostellō pros ymas prophētas kai sophous kai grammateis kai ex autōn apokteneite kai staurōsete kai ex autōn mastigōsete en tais synagōgais ymōn kai diōxete apo poleōs eis polin
opōs elthē eph ymas pan aima dikaion ekchynomenon epi tēs gēs apo tou aimatos abel tou dikaiou eōs tou aimatos zachariou uiou barachiou on ephoneusate metaxy tou naou kai tou thysiastēriou
amēn legō ymin ēxei tauta panta epi tēn genean tautēn

ierousalēm ierousalēm ē apokteinousa tous prophētas kai lithobolousa tous apestalmenous pros autēn posakis ēthelēsa episynagagein ta tekna sou on tropon episynagei ornis ta nossia eautēs ypo tas pterygas kai ouk ēthelēsate
idou aphietai ymin o oikos ymōn erēmos
legō gar ymin ou mē me idēte ap arti eōs an eipēte eulogēmenos o erchomenos en onomati kyriou
kai exelthōn o iēsous eporeueto apo tou ierou kai prosēlthon oi mathētai autou epideixai autō tas oikodomas tou ierou
o de iēsous eipen autois ou blepete panta tauta amēn legō ymin ou mē aphethē ōde lithos epi lithon os ou mē katalythēsetai
kathēmenou de autou epi tou orous tōn elaiōn prosēlthon autō oi mathētai kat idian legontes eipe ēmin pote tauta estai kai ti to sēmeion tēs sēs parousias kai tēs synteleias tou aiōnos
kai apokritheis o iēsous eipen autois blepete mē tis ymas planēsē
polloi gar eleusontai epi tō onomati mou legontes egō eimi o christos kai pollous planēsousin
mellēsete de akouein polemous kai akoas polemōn orate mē throeisthe dei gar panta genesthai all oupō estin to telos
egerthēsetai gar ethnos epi ethnos kai basileia epi basileian kai esontai limoi kai loimoi kai seismoi kata topous
panta de tauta archē ōdinōn
tote paradōsousin ymas eis thlipsin kai apoktenousin ymas kai esesthe misoumenoi ypo pantōn ethnōn dia to onoma mou
kai tote skandalisthēsontai polloi kai allēlous paradōsousin kai misēsousin allēlous
kai polloi pseudoprophētai egerthēsontai kai planēsousin pollous
kai dia to plēthynthēnai tēn anomian psygēsetai ē agapē tōn pollōn
o de ypomeinas eis telos outos sōthēsetai
kai kērychthēsetai touto to euangelion tēs basileias en olē tē oikoumenē eis martyrion pasin tois ethnesin kai tote ēxei to telos
otan oun idēte to bdelygma tēs erēmōseōs to rēthen dia daniēl tou prophētou estōs en topō agiō o anaginōskōn noeitō
tote oi en tē ioudaia pheugetōsan epi ta orē
o epi tou dōmatos mē katabainetō arai ti ek tēs oikias autou
kai o en tō agrō mē epistrepsatō opisō arai ta imatia autou
ouai de tais en gastri echousais kai tais thēlazousais en ekeinais tais ēmerais
proseuchesthe de ina mē genētai ē phygē ymōn cheimōnos mēde en sabbatō
estai gar tote thlipsis megalē oia ou gegonen ap archēs kosmou eōs tou nyn oud ou mē genētai
kai ei mē ekolobōthēsan ai ēmerai ekeinai ouk an esōthē pasa sarx dia de tous eklektous kolobōthēsontai ai ēmerai ekeinai
tote ean tis ymin eipē idou ōde o christos ē ōde mē pisteusēte
egerthēsontai gar pseudochristoi kai pseudoprophētai kai dōsousin sēmeia megala kai terata ōste planēsai ei dynaton kai tous eklektous
idou proeirēka ymin
ean oun eipōsin ymin idou en tē erēmō estin mē exelthēte idou en tois tameiois mē pisteusēte
ōsper gar ē astrapē exerchetai apo anatolōn kai phainetai eōs dysmōn outōs estai kai ē parousia tou uiou tou anthrōpou
opou gar ean ē to ptōma ekei synachthēsontai oi aetoi
eutheōs de meta tēn thlipsin tōn ēmerōn ekeinōn o ēlios skotisthēsetai kai ē selēnē ou dōsei to phengos autēs kai oi asteres pesountai apo tou ouranou kai ai dynameis tōn ouranōn saleuthēsontai

kai tote phanēsetai to sēmeion tou uiou tou anthrōpou en tō ouranō kai tote kopsontai pasai ai phylai tēs gēs kai opsontai ton uion tou anthrōpou erchomenon epi tōn nephelōn tou ouranou meta dynameōs kai doxēs pollēs
kai apostelei tous angelous autou meta salpingos phōnēs megalēs kai episynaxousin tous eklektous autou ek tōn tessarōn anemōn ap akrōn ouranōn eōs akrōn autōn
apo de tēs sykēs mathete tēn parabolēn otan ēdē o klados autēs genētai apalos kai ta phylla ekphyē ginōskete oti engys to theros
outōs kai ymeis otan idēte panta tauta ginōskete oti engys estin epi thyrais
amēn legōn ymin ou mē parelthē ē genea autē eōs an panta tauta genētai
o ouranos kai ē gē pareleusontai oi de logoi mou ou mē parelthōsin
peri de tēs ēmeras ekeinēs kai tēs ōras oudeis oiden oude oi angeloi tōn ouranōn ei mē o patēr mou monos
ōsper de ai ēmerai tou nōe outōs estai kai ē parousia tou uiou tou anthrōpou
ōsper gar ēsan en tais ēmerais tais pro tou kataklysmou trōgontes kai pinontes gamountes kai ekgamizontes achri ēs ēmeras eisēlthen nōe eis tēn kibōton
kai ouk egnōsan eōs ēlthen o kataklysmos kai ēren apantas outōs estai kai ē parousia tou uiou tou anthrōpou
tote dyo esontai en tō agrō o eis paralambanetai kai o eis aphietai
dyo alēthousai en tō mylōni mia paralambanetai kai mia aphietai
grēgoreite oun oti ouk oidate poia ōra o kyrios ymōn erchetai
ekeino de ginōskete oti ei ēdei o oikodespotēs poia phylakē o kleptēs erchetai egrēgorēsen an kai ouk an eiasen diorygēnai tēn oikian autou
dia touto kai ymeis ginesthe etoimoi oti ē ōra ou dokeite o uios tou anthrōpou erchetai
tis ara estin o pistos doulos kai phronimos on katestēsen o kyrios autou epi tēs therapeias autou tou didonai autois tēn trophēn en kairō
makarios o doulos ekeinos on elthōn o kyrios autou eurēsei poiounta outōs
amēn legō ymin oti epi pasin tois yparchousin autou katastēsei auton
ean de eipē o kakos doulos ekeinos en tē kardia autou chronizei o kyrios mou elthein
kai arxētai typtein tous syndoulous esthiein de kai pinein meta tōn methyontōn
ēxei o kyrios tou doulou ekeinou en ēmera ē ou prosdoka kai en ōra ē ou ginōskei
kai dichotomēsei auton kai to meros autou meta tōn ypokritōn thēsei ekei estai o klauthmos kai o brygmos tōn odontōn
tote omoiōthēsetai ē basileia tōn ouranōn deka parthenois aitines labousai tas lampadas autōn exēlthon eis apantēsin tou nymphiou
pente de ēsan ex autōn phronimoi kai pente mōrai
aitines mōrai labousai tas lampadas eautōn ouk elabon meth eautōn elaion
ai de phronimoi elabon elaion en tois angeiois autōn meta tōn lampadōn autōn
chronizontos de tou nymphiou enystaxan pasai kai ekatheudon
mesēs de nyktos kraugē gegonen idou o nymphios erchetai exerchesthe eis apantēsin autou
tote ēgerthēsan pasai ai parthenoi ekeinai kai ekosmēsan tas lampadas autōn
ai de mōrai tais phronimois eipon dote ēmin ek tou elaiou ymōn oti ai lampades ēmōn sbennyntai
apekrithēsan de ai phronimoi legousai mēpote ouk arkesē ēmin kai ymin poreuesthe de mallon pros tous pōlountas kai agorasate eautais
aperchomenōn de autōn agorasai ēlthen o nymphios kai ai etoimoi eisēlthon met autou eis tous gamous kai ekleisthē ē thyra
ysteron de erchontai kai ai loipai parthenoi legousai kyrie kyrie anoixon ēmin
o de apokritheis eipen amēn legō ymin ouk oida ymas
grēgoreite oun oti ouk oidate tēn ēmeran oude tēn ōran en ē o uios tou anthrōpou erchetai
ōsper gar anthrōpos apodēmōn ekalesen tous idious doulous kai paredōken autois ta yparchonta autou
kai ō men edōken pente talanta ō de dyo ō de en ekastō kata tēn idian dynamin kai apedēmēsen eutheōs
poreutheis de o ta pente talanta labōn eirgasato en autois kai epoiēsen alla pente talanta
ōsautōs kai o ta dyo ekerdēsen kai autos alla dyo
o de to en labōn apelthōn ōryxen en tē gē kai apekrypsen to argyrion tou kyriou autou
meta de chronon polyn erchetai o kyrios tōn doulōn ekeinōn kai synairei met autōn logon
kai proselthōn o ta pente talanta labōn prosēnenken alla pente talanta legōn kyrie pente talanta moi paredōkas ide alla pente talanta ekerdēsa ep autois
ephē de autō o kyrios autou eu doule agathe kai piste epi oliga ēs pistos epi pollōn se katastēsō eiselthe eis tēn charan tou kyriou sou
proselthōn de kai o ta dyo talanta labōn eipen kyrie dyo talanta moi paredōkas ide alla dyo talanta ekerdēsa ep autois
ephē autō o kyrios autou eu doule agathe kai piste epi oliga ēs pistos epi pollōn se katastēsō eiselthe eis tēn charan tou kyriou sou
proselthōn de kai o to en talanton eilēphōs eipen kyrie egnōn se oti sklēros ei anthrōpos therizōn opou ouk espeiras kai synagōn othen ou dieskorpisas
kai phobētheis apelthōn ekrypsa to talanton sou en tē gē ide echeis to son
apokritheis de o kyrios autou eipen autō ponēre doule kai oknēre ēdeis oti therizō opou ouk espeira kai synagō othen ou dieskorpisa
edei oun se balein to argyrion mou tois trapezitais kai elthōn egō ekomisamēn an to emon syn tokō
arate oun ap autou to talanton kai dote tō echonti ta deka talanta
tō gar echonti panti dothēsetai kai perisseuthēsetai apo de tou mē echontos kai o echei arthēsetai ap autou
kai ton achreion doulon ekballete eis to skotos to exōteron ekei estai o klauthmos kai o brygmos tōn odontōn
otan de elthē o uios tou anthrōpou en tē doxē autou kai pantes oi agioi angeloi met autou tote kathisei epi thronou doxēs autou
kai synachthēsetai emprosthen autou panta ta ethnē kai aphoriei autous ap allēlōn ōsper o poimēn aphorizei ta probata apo tōn eriphōn
kai stēsei ta men probata ek dexiōn autou ta de eriphia ex euōnymōn
tote erei o basileus tois ek dexiōn autou deute oi eulogēmenoi tou patros mou klēronomēsate tēn ētoimasmenēn ymin basileian apo katabolēs kosmou
epeinasa gar kai edōkate moi phagein edipsēsa kai epotisate me xenos ēmēn kai synēgagete me
gymnos kai periebalete me ēsthenēsa kai epeskepsasthe me en phylakē ēmēn kai ēlthete pros me
tote apokrithēsontai autō oi dikaioi legontes kyrie pote se eidomen peinōnta kai ethrepsamen ē dipsōnta kai epotisamen
pote de se eidomen xenon kai synēgagomen ē gymnon kai periebalomen
pote de se eidomen asthenē ē en phylakē kai ēlthomen pros se
kai apokritheis o basileus erei autois amēn legō ymin eph oson epoiēsate eni toutōn tōn adelphōn mou tōn elachistōn emoi epoiēsate
tote erei kai tois ex euōnymōn poreuesthe ap emou oi katēramenoi eis to pyr to aiōnion to ētoimasmenon tō diabolō kai tois angelois autou
epeinasa gar kai ouk edōkate moi phagein edipsēsa kai ouk epotisate me
xenos ēmēn kai ou synēgagete me gymnos kai ou periebalete me asthenēs kai en phylakē kai ouk epeskepsasthe me
tote apokrithēsontai autō kai autoi legontes kyrie pote se eidomen peinōnta ē dipsōnta ē xenon ē gymnon ē asthenē ē en phylakē kai ou diēkonēsamen soi
tote apokrithēsetai autois legōn amēn legō ymin eph oson ouk epoiēsate eni toutōn tōn elachistōn oude emoi epoiēsate
kai apeleusontai outoi eis kolasin aiōnion oi de dikaioi eis zōēn aiōnion
kai egeneto ote etelesen o iēsous pantas tous logous toutous eipen tois mathētais autou
oidate oti meta dyo ēmeras to pascha ginetai kai o uios tou anthrōpou paradidotai eis to staurōthēnai
tote synēchthēsan oi archiereis kai oi grammateis kai oi presbyteroi tou laou eis tēn aulēn tou archiereōs tou legomenou kaiapha
kai synebouleusanto ina ton iēsoun kratēsōsin dolō kai apokteinōsin
elegon de mē en tē eortē ina mē thorybos genētai en tō laō
tou de iēsou genomenou en bēthania en oikia simōnos tou leprou
prosēlthen autō gynē alabastron myrou echousa barytimou kai katecheen epi tēn kephalēn autou anakeimenou
idontes de oi mathētai autou ēganaktēsan legontes eis ti ē apōleia autē
ēdynato gar touto to myron prathēnai pollou kai dothēnai ptōchois
gnous de o iēsous eipen autois ti kopous parechete tē gynaiki ergon gar kalon eirgasato eis eme
pantote gar tous ptōchous echete meth eautōn eme de ou pantote echete
balousa gar autē to myron touto epi tou sōmatos mou pros to entaphiasai me epoiēsen
amēn legō ymin opou ean kērychthē to euangelion touto en olō tō kosmō lalēthēsetai kai o epoiēsen autē eis mnēmosynon autēs
tote poreutheis eis tōn dōdeka o legomenos ioudas iskariōtēs pros tous archiereis
eipen ti thelete moi dounai kagō ymin paradōsō auton oi de estēsan autō triakonta argyria
kai apo tote ezētei eukairian ina auton paradō
tē de prōtē tōn azymōn prosēlthon oi mathētai tō iēsou legontes autō pou theleis etoimasōmen soi phagein to pascha
o de eipen ypagete eis tēn polin pros ton deina kai eipate autō o didaskalos legei o kairos mou engys estin pros se poiō to pascha meta tōn mathētōn mou
kai epoiēsan oi mathētai ōs synetaxen autois o iēsous kai ētoimasan to pascha
opsias de genomenēs anekeito meta tōn dōdeka
kai esthiontōn autōn eipen amēn legō ymin oti eis ex ymōn paradōsei me
kai lypoumenoi sphodra ērxanto legein autō ekastos autōn mēti egō eimi kyrie
o de apokritheis eipen o embapsas met emou en tō trybliō tēn cheira outos me paradōsei
o men uios tou anthrōpou ypagei kathōs gegraptai peri autou ouai de tō anthrōpō ekeinō di ou o uios tou anthrōpou paradidotai kalon ēn autō ei ouk egennēthē o anthrōpos ekeinos
apokritheis de ioudas o paradidous auton eipen mēti egō eimi rabbi legei autō sy eipas
esthiontōn de autōn labōn o iēsous ton arton kai eulogēsas eklasen kai edidou tois mathētais kai eipen labete phagete touto estin to sōma mou
kai labōn to potērion kai eucharistēsas edōken autois legōn piete ex autou pantes
touto gar estin to aima mou to tēs kainēs diathēkēs to peri pollōn ekchynomenon eis aphesin amartiōn
legō de ymin oti ou mē piō ap arti ek toutou tou gennēmatos tēs ampelou eōs tēs ēmeras ekeinēs otan auto pinō meth ymōn kainon en tē basileia tou patros mou
kai ymnēsantes exēlthon eis to oros tōn elaiōn
tote legei autois o iēsous pantes ymeis skandalisthēsesthe en emoi en tē nykti tautē gegraptai gar pataxō ton poimena kai diaskorpisthēsetai ta probata tēs poimnēs
meta de to egerthēnai me proaxō ymas eis tēn galilaian
apokritheis de o petros eipen autō ei kai pantes skandalisthēsontai en soi egō oudepote skandalisthēsomai
ephē autō o iēsous amēn legō soi oti en tautē tē nykti prin alektora phōnēsai tris aparnēsē me
legei autō o petros kan deē me syn soi apothanein ou mē se aparnēsomai omoiōs kai pantes oi mathētai eipon
tote erchetai met autōn o iēsous eis chōrion legomenon gethsēmanē kai legei tois mathētais kathisate autou eōs ou apelthōn proseuxōmai ekei
kai paralabōn ton petron kai tous dyo uious zebedaiou ērxato lypeisthai kai adēmonein
tote legei autois perilypos estin ē psychē mou eōs thanatou meinate ōde kai grēgoreite met emou
kai proelthōn mikron epesen epi prosōpon autou proseuchomenos kai legōn pater mou ei dynaton estin parelthetō ap emou to potērion touto plēn ouch ōs egō thelō all ōs sy
kai erchetai pros tous mathētas kai euriskei autous katheudontas kai legei tō petrō outōs ouk ischysate mian ōran grēgorēsai met emou
grēgoreite kai proseuchesthe ina mē eiselthēte eis peirasmon to men pneuma prothymon ē de sarx asthenēs
palin ek deuterou apelthōn prosēuxato legōn pater mou ei ou dynatai touto to potērion parelthein ap emou ean mē auto piō genēthētō to thelēma sou
kai elthōn euriskei autous palin katheudontas ēsan gar autōn oi ophthalmoi bebarēmenoi
kai apheis autous apelthōn palin prosēuxato ek tritou ton auton logon eipōn
tote erchetai pros tous mathētas autou kai legei autois katheudete to loipon kai anapauesthe idou ēngiken ē ōra kai o uios tou anthrōpou paradidotai eis cheiras amartōlōn
egeiresthe agōmen idou ēngiken o paradidous me
kai eti autou lalountos idou ioudas eis tōn dōdeka ēlthen kai met autou ochlos polys meta machairōn kai xylōn apo tōn archiereōn kai presbyterōn tou laou
o de paradidous auton edōken autois sēmeion legōn on an philēsō autos estin kratēsate auton
kai eutheōs proselthōn tō iēsou eipen chaire rabbi kai katephilēsen auton
o de iēsous eipen autō etaire eph ō parei tote proselthontes epebalon tas cheiras epi ton iēsoun kai ekratēsan auton
kai idou eis tōn meta iēsou ekteinas tēn cheira apespasen tēn machairan autou kai pataxas ton doulon tou archiereōs apheilen autou to ōtion
tote legei autō o iēsous apostrepson sou tēn machairan eis ton topon autēs pantes gar oi labontes machairan en machaira apolountai
ē dokeis oti ou dynamai arti parakalesai ton patera mou kai parastēsei moi pleious ē dōdeka legeōnas angelōn
pōs oun plērōthōsin ai graphai oti outōs dei genesthai
en ekeinē tē ōra eipen o iēsous tois ochlois ōs epi lēstēn exēlthete meta machairōn kai xylōn syllabein me kath ēmeran pros ymas ekathezomēn didaskōn en tō ierō kai ouk ekratēsate me
touto de olon gegonen ina plērōthōsin ai graphai tōn prophētōn tote oi mathētai pantes aphentes auton ephygon
oi de kratēsantes ton iēsoun apēgagon pros kaiaphan ton archierea opou oi grammateis kai oi presbyteroi synēchthēsan
o de petros ēkolouthei autō apo makrothen eōs tēs aulēs tou archiereōs kai eiselthōn esō ekathēto meta tōn ypēretōn idein to telos
oi de archiereis kai oi presbyteroi kai to synedrion olon ezētoun pseudomartyrian kata tou iēsou opōs auton thanatōsōsin
kai ouch euron kai pollōn pseudomartyrōn proselthontōn ouch euron
ysteron de proselthontes dyo pseudomartyres eipon outos ephē dynamai katalysai ton naon tou theou kai dia triōn ēmerōn oikodomēsai auton
kai anastas o archiereus eipen autō ouden apokrinē ti outoi sou katamartyrousin
o de iēsous esiōpa kai apokritheis o archiereus eipen autō exorkizō se kata tou theou tou zōntos ina ēmin eipēs ei sy ei o christos o uios tou theou
legei autō o iēsous sy eipas plēn legō ymin ap arti opsesthe ton uion tou anthrōpou kathēmenon ek dexiōn tēs dynameōs kai erchomenon epi tōn nephelōn tou ouranou
tote o archiereus dierrēxen ta imatia autou legōn oti eblasphēmēsen ti eti chreian echomen martyrōn ide nyn ēkousate tēn blasphēmian autou
ti ymin dokei oi de apokrithentes eipon enochos thanatou estin
tote eneptysan eis to prosōpon autou kai ekolaphisan auton oi de errapisan
legontes prophēteuson ēmin christe tis estin o paisas se
o de petros exō ekathēto en tē aulē kai prosēlthen autō mia paidiskē legousa kai sy ēstha meta iēsou tou galilaiou
o de ērnēsato emprosthen pantōn legōn ouk oida ti legeis
exelthonta de auton eis ton pylōna eiden auton allē kai legei tois ekei kai outos ēn meta iēsou tou nazōraiou
kai palin ērnēsato meth orkou oti ouk oida ton anthrōpon
meta mikron de proselthontes oi estōtes eipon tō petrō alēthōs kai sy ex autōn ei kai gar ē lalia sou dēlon se poiei
tote ērxato katanathematizein kai omnyein oti ouk oida ton anthrōpon kai eutheōs alektōr ephōnēsen
kai emnēsthē o petros tou rēmatos tou iēsou eirēkotos autō oti prin alektora phōnēsai tris aparnēsē me kai exelthōn exō eklausen pikrōs
prōias de genomenēs symboulion elabon pantes oi archiereis kai oi presbyteroi tou laou kata tou iēsou ōste thanatōsai auton
kai dēsantes auton apēgagon kai paredōkan auton pontiō pilatō tō ēgemoni
tote idōn ioudas o paradidous auton oti katekrithē metamelētheis apestrepsen ta triakonta argyria tois archiereusin kai tois presbyterois
legōn ēmarton paradous aima athōon oi de eipon ti pros ēmas sy opsei
kai ripsas ta argyria en tō naō anechōrēsen kai apelthōn apēnxato
oi de archiereis labontes ta argyria eipon ouk exestin balein auta eis ton korbanan epei timē aimatos estin
symboulion de labontes ēgorasan ex autōn ton agron tou kerameōs eis taphēn tois xenois
dio eklēthē o agros ekeinos agros aimatos eōs tēs sēmeron
tote eplērōthē to rēthen dia ieremiou tou prophētou legontos kai elabon ta triakonta argyria tēn timēn tou tetimēmenou on etimēsanto apo uiōn israēl
kai edōkan auta eis ton agron tou kerameōs katha synetaxen moi kyrios
o de iēsous estē emprosthen tou ēgemonos kai epērōtēsen auton o ēgemōn legōn sy ei o basileus tōn ioudaiōn o de iēsous ephē autō sy legeis
kai en tō katēgoreisthai auton ypo tōn archiereōn kai tōn presbyterōn ouden apekrinato
tote legei autō o pilatos ouk akoueis posa sou katamartyrousin
kai ouk apekrithē autō pros oude en rēma ōste thaumazein ton ēgemona lian
kata de eortēn eiōthei o ēgemōn apolyein ena tō ochlō desmion on ēthelon
eichon de tote desmion episēmon legomenon barabban
synēgmenōn oun autōn eipen autois o pilatos tina thelete apolysō ymin barabban ē iēsoun ton legomenon christon
ēdei gar oti dia phthonon paredōkan auton
kathēmenou de autou epi tou bēmatos apesteilen pros auton ē gynē autou legousa mēden soi kai tō dikaiō ekeinō polla gar epathon sēmeron kat onar di auton
oi de archiereis kai oi presbyteroi epeisan tous ochlous ina aitēsōntai ton barabban ton de iēsoun apolesōsin
apokritheis de o ēgemōn eipen autois tina thelete apo tōn dyo apolysō ymin oi de eipon barabban
legei autois o pilatos ti oun poiēsō iēsoun ton legomenon christon legousin autō pantes staurōthētō
o de ēgemōn ephē ti gar kakon epoiēsen oi de perissōs ekrazon legontes staurōthētō
idōn de o pilatos oti ouden ōphelei alla mallon thorybos ginetai labōn ydōr apenipsato tas cheiras apenanti tou ochlou legōn athōos eimi apo tou aimatos tou dikaiou toutou ymeis opsesthe
kai apokritheis pas o laos eipen to aima autou eph ēmas kai epi ta tekna ēmōn
tote apelysen autois ton barabban ton de iēsoun phragellōsas paredōken ina staurōthē
tote oi stratiōtai tou ēgemonos paralabontes ton iēsoun eis to praitōrion synēgagon ep auton olēn tēn speiran
kai ekdysantes auton periethēkan autō chlamyda kokkinēn
kai plexantes stephanon ex akanthōn epethēkan epi tēn kephalēn autou kai kalamon epi tēn dexian autou kai gonypetēsantes emprosthen autou enepaizon autō legontes chaire o basileus tōn ioudaiōn
kai emptysantes eis auton elabon ton kalamon kai etypton eis tēn kephalēn autou
kai ote enepaixan autō exedysan auton tēn chlamyda kai enedysan auton ta imatia autou kai apēgagon auton eis to staurōsai
exerchomenoi de euron anthrōpon kyrēnaion onomati simōna touton ēngareusan ina arē ton stauron autou
kai elthontes eis topon legomenon golgotha os estin legomenos kraniou topos
edōkan autō piein oxos meta cholēs memigmenon kai geusamenos ouk ēthelen piein
staurōsantes de auton diemerisanto ta imatia autou ballontes klēron ina plērōthē to rēthen ypo tou prophētou diemerisanto ta imatia mou eautois kai epi ton imatismon mou ebalon klēron
kai kathēmenoi etēroun auton ekei
kai epethēkan epanō tēs kephalēs autou tēn aitian autou gegrammenēn outos estin iēsous o basileus tōn ioudaiōn
tote staurountai syn autō dyo lēstai eis ek dexiōn kai eis ex euōnymōn
oi de paraporeuomenoi eblasphēmoun auton kinountes tas kephalas autōn
kai legontes o katalyōn ton naon kai en trisin ēmerais oikodomōn sōson seauton ei uios ei tou theou katabēthi apo tou staurou
omoiōs de kai oi archiereis empaizontes meta tōn grammateōn kai presbyterōn elegon
allous esōsen eauton ou dynatai sōsai ei basileus israēl estin katabatō nyn apo tou staurou kai pisteusomen autō
pepoithen epi ton theon rysasthō nyn auton ei thelei auton eipen gar oti theou eimi uios
to d auto kai oi lēstai oi systaurōthentes autō ōneidizon autō
apo de ektēs ōras skotos egeneto epi pasan tēn gēn eōs ōras ennatēs
peri de tēn ennatēn ōran aneboēsen o iēsous phōnē megalē legōn ēli ēli lama sabachthani tout estin thee mou thee mou ti me enkatelipes
tines de tōn ekei estōtōn akousantes elegon oti ēlian phōnei outos
kai eutheōs dramōn eis ex autōn kai labōn spongon plēsas te oxous kai peritheis kalamō epotizen auton
oi de loipoi elegon aphes idōmen ei erchetai ēlias sōsōn auton
o de iēsous palin kraxas phōnē megalē aphēken to pneuma
kai idou to katapetasma tou naou eschisthē eis dyo apo anōthen eōs katō kai ē gē eseisthē kai ai petrai eschisthēsan
kai ta mnēmeia aneōchthēsan kai polla sōmata tōn kekoimēmenōn agiōn ēgerthē
kai exelthontes ek tōn mnēmeiōn meta tēn egersin autou eisēlthon eis tēn agian polin kai enephanisthēsan pollois
o de ekatontarchos kai oi met autou tērountes ton iēsoun idontes ton seismon kai ta genomena ephobēthēsan sphodra legontes alēthōs theou uios ēn outos
ēsan de ekei gynaikes pollai apo makrothen theōrousai aitines ēkolouthēsan tō iēsou apo tēs galilaias diakonousai autō
en ais ēn maria ē magdalēnē kai maria ē tou iakōbou kai iōsē mētēr kai ē mētēr tōn uiōn zebedaiou
opsias de genomenēs ēlthen anthrōpos plousios apo arimathaias tounoma iōsēph os kai autos emathēteusen tō iēsou
outos proselthōn tō pilatō ētēsato to sōma tou iēsou tote o pilatos ekeleusen apodothēnai to sōma
kai labōn to sōma o iōsēph enetylixen auto sindoni kathara
kai ethēken auto en tō kainō autou mnēmeiō o elatomēsen en tē petra kai proskylisas lithon megan tē thyra tou mnēmeiou apēlthen
ēn de ekei maria ē magdalēnē kai ē allē maria kathēmenai apenanti tou taphou
tē de epaurion ētis estin meta tēn paraskeuēn synēchthēsan oi archiereis kai oi pharisaioi pros pilaton
legontes kyrie emnēsthēmen oti ekeinos o planos eipen eti zōn meta treis ēmeras egeiromai

keleuson oun asphalisthēnai ton taphon eōs tēs tritēs ēmeras mēpote elthontes oi mathētai autou nyktos klepsōsin auton kai eipōsin tō laō ēgerthē apo tōn nekrōn kai estai ē eschatē planē cheirōn tēs prōtēs
ephē de autois o pilatos echete koustōdian ypagete asphalisasthe ōs oidate
oi de poreuthentes ēsphalisanto ton taphon sphragisantes ton lithon meta tēs koustōdias
opse de sabbatōn tē epiphōskousē eis mian sabbatōn ēlthen maria ē magdalēnē kai ē allē maria theōrēsai ton taphon
kai idou seismos egeneto megas angelos gar kyriou katabas ex ouranou proselthōn apekylisen ton lithon apo tēs thyras kai ekathēto epanō autou
ēn de ē idea autou ōs astrapē kai to endyma autou leukon ōsei chiōn
apo de tou phobou autou eseisthēsan oi tērountes kai egenonto ōsei nekroi
apokritheis de o angelos eipen tais gynaixin mē phobeisthe ymeis oida gar oti iēsoun ton estaurōmenon zēteite
ouk estin ōde ēgerthē gar kathōs eipen deute idete ton topon opou ekeito o kyrios
kai tachy poreutheisai eipate tois mathētais autou oti ēgerthē apo tōn nekrōn kai idou proagei ymas eis tēn galilaian ekei auton opsesthe idou eipon ymin
kai exelthousai tachy apo tou mnēmeiou meta phobou kai charas megalēs edramon apangeilai tois mathētais autou
ōs de eporeuonto apangeilai tois mathētais autou kai idou o iēsous apēntēsen autais legōn chairete ai de proselthousai ekratēsan autou tous podas kai prosekynēsan autō
tote legei autais o iēsous mē phobeisthe ypagete apangeilate tois adelphois mou ina apelthōsin eis tēn galilaian kakei me opsontai
poreuomenōn de autōn idou tines tēs koustōdias elthontes eis tēn polin apēngeilan tois archiereusin apanta ta genomena
kai synachthentes meta tōn presbyterōn symboulion te labontes argyria ikana edōkan tois stratiōtais
legontes eipate oti oi mathētai autou nyktos elthontes eklepsan auton ēmōn koimōmenōn
kai ean akousthē touto epi tou ēgemonos ēmeis peisomen auton kai ymas amerimnous poiēsomen
oi de labontes ta argyria epoiēsan ōs edidachthēsan kai diephēmisthē o logos outos para ioudaiois mechri tēs sēmeron
oi de endeka mathētai eporeuthēsan eis tēn galilaian eis to oros ou etaxato autois o iēsous
kai idontes auton prosekynēsan autō oi de edistasan
kai proselthōn o iēsous elalēsen autois legōn edothē moi pasa exousia en ouranō kai epi gēs
poreuthentes oun mathēteusate panta ta ethnē baptizontes autous eis to onoma tou patros kai tou uiou kai tou agiou pneumatos
didaskontes autous tērein panta osa eneteilamēn ymin kai idou egō meth ymōn eimi pasas tas ēmeras eōs tēs synteleias tou aiōnos amēn
